mapper.sql: select l.log_id, l.work_order_id, l.area_id, a.area_name, l.executor_id, l.executor_name, l.task_type, w.title, l.content, l.result_desc, l.start_time, l.finish_time, l.create_time from garden_area_log l left join garden_area a on a.area_id = l.area_id left join garden_work_order w on w.work_order_id = l.work_order_id
mapper.select:
and a.area_name like concat('%', #{areaName}, '%')
and l.executor_name like concat('%', #{executorName}, '%')
order by l.create_time desc
